title: Option to sell our apps for a one time payment instead of subscription
excerpt:
Nowadays, I have noticed that most of our users are going for a monthly subscription instead of annual subscription ( probably an effect of the broader economic scenario ). 
Offering our app with a lifetime deal could be…

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nowadays, I have noticed that most of our users are going for a monthly subscription instead of annual subscription ( probably an effect of the broader economic scenario ).

Offering our app with a lifetime deal could be a good revenue booster. Especially in the initial days of the app when the goal is to get more engagement and feedback. ( a potential alternative to an appsumo launch ).

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: This is the single reason we don’t use monday monetization for our 15+ marketplace apps. The bad news is that starting from July 1st, 2024 apps without monday monetization will not be allowed in the marketplace. In other words monday is forcing us to subscription models
